name: spo-set-site-available-languages
title: Set available languages for a SharePoint site
shortDescription: Updates a SharePoint site's available languages by keeping only the specified languages enabled.
longDescription: Updates the multilingual settings of a SharePoint site by keeping only the specified alternate languages enabled while preserving the site's default language.

thumbnails.alt: Preview of the sample Set available languages for a SharePoint site

references.name: Want to learn more about PnP PowerShell and the cmdlets
references.description: Check out the PnP PowerShell site to get started and for the reference to the cmdlets.
